bot.start: Welcome. I help curators with checklists, reminders, and templates for cats in care. Open the Mini App to add cats and start scenarios: {miniapp_url}
bot.help: Use /start to open the menu button Open app. All scenarios and reminders are tied to a specific cat.

adopted_home.day_1: {cat_name} — Day 1 at home: food, fresh water, litter box placement. Keep it quiet; limit visitors.
adopted_home.day_2: {cat_name} — Day 2: how was the night? Any vomiting, diarrhea, or hiding without eating for 24h? If worried, message your coordinator.
adopted_home.day_3: {cat_name} — Day 3: appetite and litter use should be stabilizing. Note anything unusual for the adoption update.
adopted_home.day_4: {cat_name} — Day 4: routine check — play, rest zones, scratching options.
adopted_home.day_5: {cat_name} — Day 5: confirm microchip/adoption paperwork tasks if applicable.
adopted_home.day_6: {cat_name} — Day 6: short welfare check — eyes, ears, coat, paws.
adopted_home.day_7: {cat_name} — Week 1 milestone: send a brief update to the team if required.
adopted_home.day_8: {cat_name} — Day 8: behavior note — hiding vs exploring, vocalization.
adopted_home.day_11: {cat_name} — Day 11: diet steady? Any treats that upset stomach?
adopted_home.day_12: {cat_name} — Day 12: plan the two-week summary for the adopter check-in.
adopted_home.day_13: {cat_name} — Day 13: confirm vet follow-ups if promised to adopter.
adopted_home.day_14: {cat_name} — Day 14: end of trial period checklist — confirm adoption finalization steps with your coordinator.

new_capture.intro: {cat_name} — New intake: secure carrier, quiet room, fresh water. Avoid forced handling.
new_capture.day_1: {cat_name} — Day 1: observe breathing, wounds, parasites. Photo for records if safe.
new_capture.day_3: {cat_name} — Day 3: quarantine basics — separate airflow/gear from other animals where possible.
new_capture.day_7: {cat_name} — Week 1: reassess vet visit timing, deworming/FIV-FeLV planning per local protocol.

post_prep.reminder: {cat_name} — Time to prepare an adoption post: photos, key traits, and contact rules.

sterilization.remove_food: {cat_name} — Sterilization prep: remove food about 12 hours before anesthesia (per clinic rules). Op time: {op_at}
sterilization.remove_water: {cat_name} — Remove water about 8 hours before surgery unless clinic says otherwise. Op time: {op_at}
sterilization.operation: {cat_name} — Surgery window: {op_at}. Arrive on time with carrier, warm blanket, and emergency contact.

potential_adopter.nudge: {cat_name} — Follow up with the potential adopter: use the question template in the Mini App.

templates.sterilization_clinic: Hello! I foster with [organization]. Please book sterilization for [cat name], approx [weight] kg. Preferred dates: [dates]. Any pre-op instructions?
templates.potential_adopter_questions:
1) Housing type and windows/screens?
2) Other pets?
3) Experience with cats?
4) Vet plans and emergency budget?
5) Return policy understanding?
6) Who will care daily?
templates.post_structure: Title + 2–3 traits + age/sex (if known) + health status + location + how to apply + disclaimer that screening applies.
